containers.name: cam1
command: ffmpeg -y -nostdin -f lavfi -i 'smptebars=size=1920x1080:rate=25' -f lavfi -i 'anullsrc=r=48000:cl=stereo' -filter_complex '[0:v] fps=25 [v]; [1:a] aresample=48000 [a]' -map '[v]' -map '[a]' -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:v rawvideo -c:a pcm_s16le -f matroska tcp://localhost:10000

containers.name: cam2
command: ffmpeg -y -nostdin -f lavfi -i 'testsrc2=size=1920x1080:rate=25' -f lavfi -i 'anullsrc=r=48000:cl=stereo' -filter_complex '[0:v] fps=25 [v]; [1:a] aresample=48000 [a]' -map '[v]' -map '[a]' -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:v rawvideo -c:a pcm_s16le -f matroska tcp://localhost:10001

containers.name: cam3
command: ffmpeg -y -nostdin -f lavfi -i 'color=c=green:size=1920x1080:rate=25' -f lavfi -i 'anullsrc=r=48000:cl=stereo' -filter_complex '[0:v] fps=25 [v]; [1:a] aresample=48000 [a]' -map '[v]' -map '[a]' -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:v rawvideo -c:a pcm_s16le -f matroska tcp://localhost:10002

containers.name: cam4
command: ffmpeg -y -nostdin -f lavfi -i 'color=c=blue:size=1920x1080:rate=25' -f lavfi -i 'anullsrc=r=48000:cl=stereo' -filter_complex '[0:v] fps=25 [v]; [1:a] aresample=48000 [a]' -map '[v]' -map '[a]' -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:v rawvideo -c:a pcm_s16le -f matroska tcp://localhost:10003
